rationale: Candidate c1dec1081c1a69083e039e5fdaf446acef0a7e38 is the best choice because it captures Dan's direct, informal, and punchy style (using 'du/dein') which fits the original blog post's tone much better than the formal 'Sie/Ihr' used in other versions. It also correctly translates the title (which was missing in the current version) and maintains perfect MDX structure and technical terminology.
